title: Amtech P3205 Contour Gauge, Durable Non-Marking Plastic Measures, Ideal for DIY, Construction, and Carpentry, 14cm Length
availability_text: This item cannot be dispatched to your selected delivery location. Please choose a different delivery location.
features: VERSATILE: This handy contour gauge is used to measure and draw contours, firmly gauging shapes to be copied onto tiles or flooring panels for precise tiling/fitting around pipes, window sills, switches, sanitary fixtures, basins, and architraves
EASY TO USE: To use, simply press the gauge against any object and then trace the contours of the surface
DURABLE: 140mm in length, the profile gauge is made from durable, non-marking plastic
WORKSHOP FRIENDLY: Ideal for home use or trade environments
STABLE OPERATION: Designed to minimise movement during cutting tasks
description: Product Description The Amtech P3205 contour gauge is easy to use and firmly gauges shapes with precision. Benefits from non-marking plastic measures which are durable and supplied in a 14cm length. Amtech have a fantastic range of essential tools for all your DIY requirements. Great value prices are coupled with a very compelling 3 year product guarantee. So keep your home, garage and garden looking great and well maintained for less! Don’t forget to also take advantage of Amtech’s free product advice service – see pack for more details. Please note that Amtech warranty and service terms are only applicable to genuine Amtech products. Safety Warning No Box Contains 1x Gauge See more
